ddls:
CREATE TABLE "service_tiers" (
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the service tier */,
  "tier_description" TEXT /* Description of the service tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service tier */,
  "dtu" INTEGER /* Database Transaction Units (DTUs) for the tier */,
  "max_db_size" TEXT /* Maximum database size allowed for the tier */,
  "max_worker_threads" INTEGER /* Maximum number of worker threads for the tier */,
  "max_sessions" INTEGER /* Maximum number of sessions for the tier */,
  "benchmark_rate" TEXT /* Benchmark rate of transactions for the tier */,
  "predictability" TEXT /* Predictability of performance for the tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES service_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "account_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account manager assigned to the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_account_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_manager_id") REFERENCES account_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the account manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the account manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the manager was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "db_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the database */,
  "tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service tier assigned to the database */,
  "db_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "current_size" TEXT /* Current size of the database */,
  "current_sessions" INTEGER /* Current number of sessions */,
  "current_worker_threads" INTEGER /* Current number of worker threads */,
  "auto_scaling_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if auto-scaling is enabled for the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("db_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("tier_id") REFERENCES service_tiers ("tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage log entry */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database for which the log is recorded */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log entry */,
  "transactions_per_hour" INTEGER /* Number of transactions per hour */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of active sessions */,
  "worker_thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of active worker threads */,
  "cpu_usage" TEXT /* CPU usage percentage */,
  "memory_usage" TEXT /* Memory usage percentage */,
  "disk_usage" TEXT /* Disk usage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_logs_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database for which the alert is generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., performance, resource limit) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was generated */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, client, read-only) */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., database, client, alert) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scaling_history" (
  "scaling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scaling event */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database that was scaled */,
  "scaling_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the scaling event */,
  "scaling_type" TEXT /* Type of scaling event (e.g., up, down) */,
  "new_size" TEXT /* New size of the database after scaling */,
  "new_tier_id" INTEGER /* New service tier ID after scaling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scaling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scaling_history_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for prediction */,
  "db_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database for which the prediction was made */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the prediction */,
  "predicted_value" TEXT /* Predicted value (e.g., CPU usage, transaction rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES prediction_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_db_id FOREIGN KEY ("db_id") REFERENCES databases ("db_id")
)
